classifications.phrase: maintain the targets for the cash rate
help keep interest rates low for borrowers
Wage and prices pressures remain subdued
Inflation is expected to average between 1 and 1½ per cent
maintain highly accommodative settings as long as is required
will not increase the cash rate target until progress is being made towards full employment
confident that inflation will be sustainably within the 2–3 per cent target band

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish stance overall, maintaining accommodative policy to support employment and growth while inflation remains subdued, with a forward guidance commitment not to raise rates until employment recovers and inflation reaches target.
